ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "wieland_code" TEXT /* Wieland code for the material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was last updated */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the material */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "en_standards" (
  "en_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EN standard */,
  "en_designation" TEXT /* EN designation for the material */,
  "en_no" TEXT /* EN number for the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material this standard applies to */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the EN standard */,
  "standard_date" TEXT /* Date of the EN standard's publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("en_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_en_standards_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "astm_standards" (
  "astm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ASTM standard */,
  "astm_uns_no" TEXT /* ASTM UNS number for the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material this standard applies to */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the ASTM standard */,
  "standard_date" TEXT /* Date of the ASTM standard's publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("astm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_astm_standards_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jis_standards" (
  "jis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JIS standard */,
  "jis_no" TEXT /* JIS number for the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material this standard applies to */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the JIS standard */,
  "standard_date" TEXT /* Date of the JIS standard's publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jis_standards_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material property */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material this property applies to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "property_source" TEXT /* Source of the property data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_properties_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material this document applies to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, compliance certificate) */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author or uploader of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_documents_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
